items.name: Momo Mince Spring Roll
items.description: Momo seasoned lean beef mince with your choice of chilli sauce, soy sauce, sweet chilli sauce.

items.name: Momo Mince Burger
items.description: Momo seasoned lean beef mince, tasty cheese, pickle, burger sauce, served with chips and salad.

items.name: Tasty Tibetan Beef Momo
items.description: Tibetan authentic seasoned beef mince, onion, wrapped in hand made dough served with house made chilli sauce & soy sauce (steamed, fried, $1 for pan fried).

items.name: Tasty Tibetan Chicken Momo
items.description: Tibetan authentic seasoned chicken mince, onion, ginger, garlic, wrapped in hand made dough served with house made chilli sauce & soy sauce (steamed, fried, $1 for pan fried).

items.name: Tasty Tibetan Veg Momo
items.description: Tibetan authentic seasoned mixed fresh vegetables, wrapped in hand made dough served with salad, house made chilli sauce & soy sauce (steamed, fried, $1 for pan fried).

items.name: Tasty Tibetan Beef Shapaley
items.description: Tibetan authentic street food of seasoned beef mince, onion, wrapped in hand made dough and flattened and deep fried, served with salad, house made chilli sauce & soy sauce.

items.name: Egg Fried Rice
items.description: Chef's special seasoned & steamed rice, fresh diced veggies, free range eggs, served with house made chilli (add beef $3 chicken $3 prawn $4.5).

items.name: Tibetan Vege Stir Fry Noodle
items.description: Angel hair noodle, wombok, bok choy, capsicum, onion served with your choice of chilli level (add beef $3 chicken $3 prawn $4.5).

items.name: Thenthuk
items.description: The famous hand pulled noodle common in Tibetan cuisine, with green vegies, served with chilli sauce on the side.

items.name: Mothuk (Momo Soup)
items.description: Authentic hand folded Tibetan mothuk served in deeply flavorful soup with seasonal green vegetables and signature house made chilli sauce on the side.

items.name: Mixed Tasty Plate
items.description: 3x beef momo, 2x shapaley, 3x spring roll, fried rice.

items.name: Mixed Tasty Momo Plates
items.description: 3 beef momo, 3 chicken momo, 3 veg momo.
